meta-description: Learn about insurance co-ops by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Insurance co-op
excerpt: A non-profit entity in which the same people who own the company are insured by the company. Cooperatives can be formed at a national, state or local level, and can include doctors, hospitals and businesses as member-owners.
content: A non-profit entity in which the same people who own the company are insured by the company. Cooperatives can be formed at a national, state or local level, and can include doctors, hospitals and businesses as member-owners.
